title: Macrorungia formosissima
taxonomy: Macrorungia formosissima is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to South Africa, where it grows in rocky areas. The plant belongs to the genus Macrorungia, which is relatively small with a few species. Macrorungia formosissima is an endemic species, meaning it can only be found in the specific region of its origin. As a member of the Acanthaceae family, Macrorungia formosissima is closely related to other plants like Justicia and Thysanostigma.
